exploration_notes: The Starlark BUILD file evaluation pipeline works as follows: PackageFunction (Skyframe) calls PackageFactory.executeBuildFile(), which sets up a StarlarkThread and invokes Eval to interpret the BUILD file. StarlarkThread (net/starlark/java/eval/) is the Starlark runtime environment. BzlLoadFunction handles loading .bzl files via Skyframe. The rule() and macro() builtin functions are implemented in StarlarkRuleClassFunctions (in analysis/starlark/), which creates StarlarkRuleFunction and MacroCl
